plans._status_line: Planned 5 stills + 5 motion clips · locked spec-contrast assets · prioritised REQUIRED for REEL · ready for Visual Brief

website_truth.verified_disclaimer: Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Swatch Group Ltd or Audemars Piguet.

asset_strategy.primary_goal: Contrast Cradle Adapter V1’s engineering precision with generic competitors using spec-driven visuals
asset_strategy.creative_priority: Spec contrast, fit precision, side-by-side competitor comparison
asset_strategy.why_this_asset_mix_wins: Directly addresses audience skepticism about generic adapters by visually proving Cradle Adapter V1’s exact fit (40.35mm, 0.7mm, 22mm) and material quality (FKM rubber). Side-by-side comparison reinforces superiority.

image_blueprint.subject: Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome) on Royal Pop, top-down view
image_blueprint.purpose: Establish premium design and exact fit
image_blueprint.composition: Centered, shallow depth of field, FKM texture visible
image_blueprint.lighting: Soft diffused light, slight shadow to emphasize depth
image_blueprint.product_pose: Adapter seated on Royal Pop, crown notches aligned
image_blueprint.text_safe_area: Top 20% and bottom 20% reserved for on-screen text
image_blueprint.notes: Hero image for REEL cover and opening shot. Must align with script beat '40.35mm. 0.7mm. 22mm.'

image_blueprint.subject: Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome) with spec callouts
image_blueprint.composition: Orthographic projection, white background, spec labels
image_blueprint.product_pose: Adapter isolated, top and side views
image_blueprint.notes: Source for SPEC_CALLOUT_MOTION video. Must match script beats 'Exact fit for Royal Pop’s socket.' and '0.7mm lip holds it secure.'

image_blueprint.subject: Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome) vs. generic competitor adapter on Royal Pop
image_blueprint.composition: Split frame, Cradle Adapter V1 on left, competitor on right, same Royal Pop model
image_blueprint.product_pose: Adapters seated on Royal Pop, top-down view
image_blueprint.notes: Source for COVER_TO_MOTION_TRANSITION video. Must align with script beat 'Generic adapters? Loose. Risky.'

image_blueprint.subject: Cradle Adapter V1 (Arctic Blue) on Royal Pop, worn on wrist
image_blueprint.composition: Wrist shot, slight angle, FKM texture visible
image_blueprint.product_pose: Adapter seated on Royal Pop, crown notches aligned, wrist slightly tilted
image_blueprint.notes: Source for WRIST_FIT_DEMO video. Supports script beat '22mm lugs. Standard straps work.'

image_blueprint.subject: Close-up of Cradle Adapter V1’s 0.7mm retaining lip
image_blueprint.composition: Extreme close-up, shallow depth of field
image_blueprint.lighting: Raking light to emphasize lip detail
image_blueprint.notes: Source for MACRO_SWEEP video. Supports script beat '0.7mm lip holds it secure.'

motion_blueprint.subject_motion: None (static adapter, Royal Pop subtle vibration to simulate wrist movement)
motion_blueprint.camera_motion: Slow push-in from top-down to 45-degree angle, focus on adapter socket
motion_blueprint.transition_out: Hold final frame for 0.5s, then cut to next clip
motion_blueprint.prompt: Premium product shot of Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome) on Royal Pop, top-down view. Slow push-in camera motion to 45-degree angle. Soft diffused lighting, shallow depth of field. FKM rubber texture visible. Neutral gradient background. No motion blur. 4K resolution.
motion_blueprint.negative_prompt: Competitor products, human wrist, overly stylized reflections, chaotic motion, particles, floating objects, aggressive transitions, scene changes, text overlays, logos, watermarks.
motion_blueprint.notes: Opening clip for REEL. Aligns with script beats '40.35mm. 0.7mm. 22mm.' and 'Competitors miss this.'

motion_blueprint.transition_out: Hold final frame for 0.5s, then cut to next clip
motion_blueprint.prompt: Technical board of Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome) with spec callouts. Orthographic projection, white background. Spec labels animate in sequentially: 40.35mm socket, 0.7mm retaining lip, 22mm lug width. Flat even lighting, no shadows. No motion blur. 4K resolution.
motion_blueprint.negative_prompt: Competitor products, human elements, decorative graphics, chaotic motion, particles, floating objects, aggressive transitions, scene changes, text overlays outside labels, logos, watermarks.
motion_blueprint.notes: Supports script beats 'Exact fit for Royal Pop’s socket.', '0.7mm lip holds it secure.', and '22mm lugs. Standard straps work.'

motion_blueprint.camera_motion: Slow zoom-in to Cradle Adapter V1 side, competitor side fades to 50% opacity
motion_blueprint.transition_out: Hold final frame for 0.5s, then cut to next clip
motion_blueprint.prompt: Split frame: Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome) on left, generic competitor adapter on right, both on Royal Pop. Slow zoom-in to Cradle Adapter V1 side, competitor side fades to 50% opacity. Consistent lighting across both adapters. Neutral gray background. No motion blur. 4K resolution.
motion_blueprint.negative_prompt: Misleading scale, overly negative competitor portrayal, chaotic motion, particles, floating objects, aggressive transitions, scene changes, text overlays, logos, watermarks.
motion_blueprint.notes: Aligns with script beat 'Generic adapters? Loose. Risky.'

motion_blueprint.subject_motion: Wrist rotates slightly (5 degrees left/right) to show adapter fit
motion_blueprint.camera_motion: None (static camera, slight follow focus on adapter)
motion_blueprint.transition_out: Hold final frame for 0.5s, then cut to next clip
motion_blueprint.prompt: Wrist shot of Cradle Adapter V1 (Arctic Blue) on Royal Pop. Wrist rotates slightly (5 degrees left/right) to show adapter fit. Natural diffused lighting, soft shadows. Blurred neutral background. FKM texture visible. No motion blur. 4K resolution.
motion_blueprint.negative_prompt: Competitor products, overly posed wrist, distracting background, chaotic motion, particles, floating objects, aggressive transitions, scene changes, text overlays, logos, watermarks.
motion_blueprint.notes: Supports script beat '22mm lugs. Standard straps work.'

motion_blueprint.camera_motion: Slow horizontal sweep across 0.7mm retaining lip
motion_blueprint.transition_out: Hold final frame for 0.5s, then cut to CTA clip
motion_blueprint.prompt: Extreme close-up of Cradle Adapter V1’s 0.7mm retaining lip. Slow horizontal camera sweep across lip detail. Raking light to emphasize texture. Dark background. No motion blur. 4K resolution.
motion_blueprint.negative_prompt: Competitor products, human elements, overly stylized reflections, chaotic motion, particles, floating objects, aggressive transitions, scene changes, text overlays, logos, watermarks.
motion_blueprint.notes: Supports script beat '0.7mm lip holds it secure.' Optional upgrade if REEL duration allows.

build_order.why_first: REQUIRED stills for core REEL narrative (HOOK, PROOF, CONTRAST, DESIRE)
REQUIRED motion clips to complete REEL structure
USEFUL assets to enhance technical trust if time allows

recommended_sequence: CTA (on-screen text: 'Pre-Order Now — limited early access.')
handoff_for_visual_brief.cta_asset: On-screen text overlay (final frame of VID_04_WRIST_FIT_DEMO)
handoff_for_visual_brief.editing_note: Maintain calm, deliberate pace. Use subtle transitions between clips. Align motion with script beats. Ensure spec labels in VID_02_SPEC_CALLOUT_MOTION animate in sync with voiceover.
